key_outcome: The existing capture-only runner was executed once as requested, but the run blocked immediately because DOCUSIGN_SIGNING_URL was not set, so no fresh Physical Operating Address capture artifacts were produced and coverage did not move forward.
blockers: DOCUSIGN_SIGNING_URL is not set in the repo environment or .env for the sanctioned capture-only run.
No fresh Physical Operating Address capture artifacts were produced, so field-local label verification could not advance.
uncertainty: Because the runner exited before opening the signer, this run cannot determine whether the tightened refinement now isolates field-local Address Line 1, City, State, ZIP, or Postal Code labels.
The saved artifact remains the old spillover capture from 2026-05-01, so its missing-label state may not reflect current live signer DOM behavior.
next_recommendation: Populate a fresh DOCUSIGN_SIGNING_URL in the repo environment or .env, rerun npm run capture:physical-address once, inspect the regenerated sanitized Physical Operating Address artifacts for field-local labels, and only then refresh the reports.
